cause_analysis.narrative: Destyns Salon churned on 2026-02-02 after 195 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-14 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "horrible". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 19 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
